sections.paragraph:
- Original: Σάμος

- Transliteration: Samos

- Phonetic: sam'-os

- Definition: Samos = "a sandy bluff"

1. an island off that part of Asia Minor where Ionia touches Caria

- Origin: of uncertain affinity

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Of uncertain affinity; Samus an island of the mediterranean: - Samos.
